#SecKerry: I am a big World Cup soccer fan and I know #Germany is a powerhouse! #YouthConnect
(Photo) #SecKerry is speaking with young German innovators and leaders at Berlin:#YouthConnect this morning. http://t.co/vIAIWeH3So
#SecKerry: We thank #Germany for help and support with respect to #Afghanistan, #Iran, other important initiatives. #YouthConnect
#SecKerry just mentioned @FulbrightPrgrm, underscored importance of student exchanges. Want to apply? http://t.co/hwj0d2l3Xj #YouthConnect
#SecKerry: We are committed to two state solution in Middle East peace process, and so is Europe. #YouthConnect
#SecKerry: We are fighting against terrorism and for rule of law, respect for diversity, tolerance. #YouthConnect
#SecKerry: President Obama's announcement about #TTIP is evidence that we think #Europe is critically important. #YouthConnect
#SecKerry: We are paying attention to #Asia - and so are you. But we are not doing it at the expense of #Europe. #YouthConnect
#SecKerry: President Obama wants to partner w/Germany on #climatechange. Your expertise can help us w/renewable energy production capacity.
#SecKerry: Partnership US has with #Germany is extraordinary. We are grateful for leadership, cooperation on tough issues we face together.
#SecKerry: Europe is strong, and stronger together. Europe and the US together have an opportunity to create jobs, build a stronger future.
#SecKerry: You all are changing history. My job is not just to talk to leaders of the world, but to talk to you - the future. #YouthConnect
#SecKerry greets a packed house of more than 100 young Germans at his #YouthConnect event at #Basecamp, Berlin.

(Photo) #SecKerry delivers remarks @UVA: http://t.co/3sBhvTIE
#SecKerry: America is not exceptional simply because we say we are, but because we do exceptional things. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: It is hard to tell the leadership of any number of countries they must resolve their economic issues if we don’t resolve our own.
#SecKerry: In these days of a looming budget sequester, we can’t be strong in the world unless we are strong at home. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: Foreign assistance is not a giveaway. It is not charity. It is an investment in a strong America and free world. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry just mentioned @FulbrightPrgrm. Want to learn more? Go to http://t.co/jkTlqMVj. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: We value gender equality. Countries are more peaceful, prosperous when women and girls are afforded equal rights and opportunity.
Want to know how we are making progress in the fight against HIV/AIDS? Go to http://t.co/eoYS6qmA and follow @PEPFAR.
#SecKerry: We seek to protect against polio, malaria, TB; reach for AIDS-free generation - diseases don’t discriminate by nationality.
#SecKerry: We value health and nutrition and the principle of helping people gain the strength to help themselves. #StateDept4US
(Photo) #SecKerry meets with @UVA students: http://t.co/wvH4YiKL
#SecKerry: Deploying diplomats today is much cheaper than deploying troops tomorrow. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: If we want more assistance graduates -countries that once took our aid but now buy our exports- we cannot afford to pull back.
(Photo) #SecKerry and @UVA President Sullivan walk across the Lawn: http://t.co/WTi2QXUo
What do @StateDept and @USAID do for the American people? 10 things you should know: http://t.co/scFAuDc0 #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: Our goal is to use assistance, development to help nations realize their own potential, ultimately become our economic partners.
#SecKerry: We create more than 5,000 #jobs for every billion dollars of goods and services we export. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: There is nothing in this current budget fight that forces us to retrench or retreat. This is a time to continue to engage.
#SecKerry: Our foreign policy budget is just over 1 percent of our national budget; 1 percent funds all civilian foreign affairs efforts.
#SecKerry: A wise investment in foreign policy yields for a nation the same return that an education does for a student. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: A sense of shared responsibility – that we care about something bigger than ourselves – is central to spirit of @UVA, our nation.
#SecKerry: Our challenge is to tame the worst impulses of globalization as we harness its ability to spread information and possibility.
#SecKerry: For all we’ve gained in the 21st century, we’ve lost the luxury of just looking inward. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: In today’s global world, there is no longer anything foreign about foreign policy. #StateDept4US
#SecKerry: Thanks to Senator @TimKaine, @RepRobertHurt, @UVA for this welcome to Charlottesville. #StateDept4US
